top3.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM Patient p
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 
    FROM Laboratory l 
    WHERE l.ID = p.ID 
    AND l.CRP IS NOT NULL 
    AND l.CRP = 'abnormal'
) 
AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 
    FROM Laboratory l2 
    WHERE l2.ID = p.ID 
    AND l2.CRP IS NOT NULL
);

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM Patient p
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 
    FROM Laboratory l 
    WHERE l.ID = p.ID 
    AND l.CRP IS NOT NULL 
    AND l.CRP = 'abnormal'
) 
AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 
    FROM Laboratory l2 
    WHERE l2.ID = p.ID 
    AND l2.CRP IS NOT NULL
);

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM Patient p
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 
    FROM Laboratory l 
    WHERE l.ID = p.ID 
    AND (l.CRP = 'abnormal' OR l.CRP LIKE '%abnormal%')
) 
AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 
    FROM Laboratory l2 
    WHERE l2.ID = p.ID 
    AND l2.CRP IS NOT NULL
);

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM Patient p
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 
    FROM Laboratory l 
    WHERE l.ID = p.ID 
    AND l.CRP = 'abnormal'
) 
AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 
    FROM Laboratory l2 
    WHERE l2.ID = p.ID 
    AND l2.CRP IS NOT NULL
);

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM Patient p
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 
    FROM Laboratory l 
    WHERE l.ID = p.ID 
    AND l.CRP IS NOT NULL 
    AND l.CRP = 'abnormal'
) 
AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 
    FROM Laboratory l2 
    WHERE l2.ID = p.ID 
    AND l2.CRP IS NOT NULL
);

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM Patient 
WHERE ID IN (
    SELECT ID 
    FROM Examination 
    WHERE `aCL IgG` = 'abnormal' OR `aCL IgM` = 'abnormal' OR `aCL IgA` = 'abnormal'
) 
AND ID NOT IN (
    SELECT ID 
    FROM Laboratory
);

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM Patient p
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 
    FROM Laboratory l 
    WHERE l.ID = p.ID 
    AND (l.CRP = 'abnormal' OR l.CRP LIKE '%abnormal%')
) 
AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 
    FROM Laboratory l2 
    WHERE l2.ID = p.ID 
    AND l2.CRP IS NOT NULL
);

final.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM Patient p
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 
    FROM Laboratory l 
    WHERE l.ID = p.ID 
    AND l.CRP IS NOT NULL 
    AND l.CRP = 'abnormal'
) 
AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 
    FROM Laboratory l2 
    WHERE l2.ID = p.ID 
    AND l2.CRP IS NOT NULL
);
